TITLE: ECS Instance Inspector
FUNCTIONAL_POSITIONING: Inspect and diagnose ECS instances for health status and configuration
TRIGGER_CONDITIONS: 检查ECS, 查看云服务器, 查看实例状态, inspect ecs, ecs diagnosis, check instance
PREREQUISITE: Requires hcloud CLI with ECS ReadOnlyAccess policy
OVERVIEW: A skill that inspects and diagnoses Huawei Cloud ECS instances, checking health status, configuration, and network settings
EDGE_CASE_1_SOLUTION: Return 'Instance[%s] could not be found.' error
EDGE_CASE_2_SOLUTION: Return empty result with info message 'No instances found'
EDGE_CASE_3_SOLUTION: Guide user to check IAM policy and region configuration
MFA_DESCRIPTION: No MFA required for read-only operations
